## Meeting Purpose

[Interview with Nathalie Schrans for Technical Managing Editor role at GrowthX](https://fathom.video/share/JUt1q6VQCTbYYehU8KF8pr_SDpsxzxft?tab=summary&timestamp=4.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [GrowthX is building a platform (ContentOS) that combines AI workflows with expert intervention for content creation and management](https://fathom.video/share/JUt1q6VQCTbYYehU8KF8pr_SDpsxzxft?tab=summary&timestamp=115.0)
  - [The company is experiencing rapid growth, with $10M in the bank, approaching $10M run rate, and strong investor interest](https://fathom.video/share/JUt1q6VQCTbYYehU8KF8pr_SDpsxzxft?tab=summary&timestamp=1636.0)
  - [Nathalie has extensive experience in full-stack content marketing and is excited about the opportunity to focus on editorial work at GrowthX](https://fathom.video/share/JUt1q6VQCTbYYehU8KF8pr_SDpsxzxft?tab=summary&timestamp=435.0)
  - [GrowthX offers significant growth opportunities for high-performing team members who focus on customer outcomes and company success](https://fathom.video/share/JUt1q6VQCTbYYehU8KF8pr_SDpsxzxft?tab=summary&timestamp=489.0)

## Topics

### GrowthX's Vision and Platform

  - [Building ContentOS, a platform combining AI workflows with expert intervention](https://fathom.video/share/JUt1q6VQCTbYYehU8KF8pr_SDpsxzxft?tab=summary&timestamp=115.0)
  - [Solving pain points in content creation and management that existing tools don't address](https://fathom.video/share/JUt1q6VQCTbYYehU8KF8pr_SDpsxzxft?tab=summary&timestamp=194.0)
  - [Developing common cores that could be productized or exposed as APIs in the future](https://fathom.video/share/JUt1q6VQCTbYYehU8KF8pr_SDpsxzxft?tab=summary&timestamp=349.0)
  - [Focus on continuous improvement: as models improve, everything should get better, faster, and cheaper](https://fathom.video/share/JUt1q6VQCTbYYehU8KF8pr_SDpsxzxft?tab=summary&timestamp=289.0)

### Nathalie's Approach to Client Work

  - [Starts with comprehensive information gathering (surveys, docs, kickoff calls)](https://fathom.video/share/JUt1q6VQCTbYYehU8KF8pr_SDpsxzxft?tab=summary&timestamp=524.0)
  - [Conducts thorough research and audits (competitive analysis, content refresh, AI search visibility)](https://fathom.video/share/JUt1q6VQCTbYYehU8KF8pr_SDpsxzxft?tab=summary&timestamp=677.0)
  - [Prioritizes collaboration and feedback from clients](https://fathom.video/share/JUt1q6VQCTbYYehU8KF8pr_SDpsxzxft?tab=summary&timestamp=789.0)
  - [Focuses on creating specific, helpful, and actionable content](https://fathom.video/share/JUt1q6VQCTbYYehU8KF8pr_SDpsxzxft?tab=summary&timestamp=1131.0)
  - [Remains flexible to meet evolving client needs (e.g., expanding beyond typical content marketing)](https://fathom.video/share/JUt1q6VQCTbYYehU8KF8pr_SDpsxzxft?tab=summary&timestamp=524.0)

### GrowthX Company Culture and Growth

  - [High bar for performance with a focus on customer outcomes and being resourceful](https://fathom.video/share/JUt1q6VQCTbYYehU8KF8pr_SDpsxzxft?tab=summary&timestamp=1536.0)
  - [Rapid promotion opportunities for high-performers (multiple examples given)](https://fathom.video/share/JUt1q6VQCTbYYehU8KF8pr_SDpsxzxft?tab=summary&timestamp=1451.0)
  - [Strong financial position: $10M+ in bank, 2-year runway, on track for profitability by year-end](https://fathom.video/share/JUt1q6VQCTbYYehU8KF8pr_SDpsxzxft?tab=summary&timestamp=1636.0)
  - [Impressive client roster including SentinelOne, Abnormal Security, and Webflow](https://fathom.video/share/JUt1q6VQCTbYYehU8KF8pr_SDpsxzxft?tab=summary&timestamp=1692.0)

### Role Expectations and Opportunities

  - [Focus on improving workflows, reviewing content, and applying editorial judgment](https://fathom.video/share/JUt1q6VQCTbYYehU8KF8pr_SDpsxzxft?tab=summary&timestamp=1087.0)
  - [Potential for exploring other roles or responsibilities within the company](https://fathom.video/share/JUt1q6VQCTbYYehU8KF8pr_SDpsxzxft?tab=summary&timestamp=1406.0)
  - [Less context-switching compared to full-stack content marketing roles](https://fathom.video/share/JUt1q6VQCTbYYehU8KF8pr_SDpsxzxft?tab=summary&timestamp=957.0)

## Next Steps

  - GrowthX to continue with their expedited hiring process
  - Nathalie to consider the opportunity in light of the company's growth and culture
  - Potential follow-up on any remaining questions or next steps in the interview process
